description: Configure Tor Browser for an upcoming asset tracing investigation. Verify Tor connectivity via https://check.torproject.org/ and ensure https://www.courtlistener.com is reachable. The browser configuration must include cookie exceptions for https://www.courtlistener.com, https://www.opencorporates.com, and https://archive.org, a popup exception for https://www.courtlistener.com, disabled global web notifications, and a blank homepage. Create a preparation report at /home/ga/Documents/investigation_prep.txt (minimum 50 bytes) containing a confirmation statement (including the word 'Tor' and one of the following: 'active', 'confirmed', 'connected', or 'verified'), the three domains configured for exceptions, and the current date.
